description: Animated multi-stop supply chain across a world map. Numbered waypoints appear sequentially with arcs connecting them. Best for logistics, production chains, trafficking routes, contraband flows.

fields.TITLE_TEXT: Headline, e.g. 'FENTANYL SUPPLY CHAIN' or 'GLOBAL PRODUCTION ROUTE'
fields.CONTEXT_TEXT: Summary sentence shown at end, e.g. 'Raw materials processed across 4 countries before reaching consumers'
fields.LABEL_1: Stat label for stop 1, e.g. 'PRODUCTION' or 'SOURCING'
